holdings.infoBox: CVAR is an equity ETF with a total of 89 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bonds 2.875% stock at 4.27%, MarketAxess Holdings at 3.52%, United States Treasury Bonds 4.625% at 3.14%, Healthcare Services Group at 2.82%, and Core Laboratories at 2.79%.

overview.description: The Cultivar ETF (CVAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that combines top-down and bottom-up analysis to select undervalued, US-listed stocks from a broad spectrum of industries and market-caps. CVAR was launched on Dec 22, 2021 and is issued by Cultivar.
